message.content: {"query":"web search engine","summary":"Web search engines are systems designed to search for information on the World Wide Web. Popular examples include Google, Bing, and DuckDuckGo.","results":[{"title":"DuckDuckGo","url":"https://duckduckgo.com","snippet":"The Internet privacy company that empowers you to seamlessly take control of your personal information online."},{"title":"How Search Engines Work","url":"https://example.com/how-search-works","snippet":"Search engines crawl, index, and rank web pages to provide relevant results."}]}
